title: Magnetic Gift Box for Presents 18 x18 x7.5 cm,Small Gift Boxes Purple with Lid for Gifts, Paper Wedding Favor Boxes,Birthday Gift Box Bulk, Party Favor Boxes
features: 【HIGH QUALITY】The collapsible magnetic gift box is made of high-quality hard board,strong,reliable and durable. Effectively protect your gift from being crushed and deformed.
【Size】 Measuring 18cm in length, 18cm in width and 7.5cm in height, it's the perfect size for a small sized gift.
【No Assembly Required】The box arrives flat but goes into the right shape when you open the box without effort. And then peel the paper off and the sides stick nicely without needing to hold it.

【Magnetic Closure Lid】The sturdy gift box has magnetic closure design, which can be used repeatedly and also used as a storage box.It is easy to clean,only need wipe gently with dry cloth to restore the bright.

【Multiple Uses】-Gift box can be put on drawer, dresser, bedside table and add an atmosphere to the festival: business gifts, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Day, birthday gifts, wedding gifts, etc.
